code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut p = 0
mut n = 0
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      if v > 0
        p = p + v
      else if v < 0
        n = n + v
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let r = p - n
println("r=#{r}")
